tests.name: 16Personalities (MBTI)
tests.description: The most popular MBTI-style test. Returns a 4-letter type plus 5 percentages.
tests.result: INTJ-A | 86% I, 63% N, 93% T, 85% J, 71% Assertive

tests.name: Political Compass Test
tests.description: Classic two-axis political compass. Returns economic (left/right) and social (authoritarian/libertarian) coordinates.
tests.result: True Center | Economic: -0.38, Social: +0.15 (official score confirmed by user)

tests.name: Big Five IPIP-NEO (OpenPsychometrics)
tests.description: Free, research-grade Big Five personality test. Returns OCEAN percentile scores.
tests.result: O:36 C:95 E:39 A:75 N:49 | Screenshots stored locally in ipip-neo/

tests.name: Truity Enneagram
tests.description: Enneagram personality test. Returns a type (1-9) and wing, plus scores for all types.
tests.result: Type 5 — The Investigator | Wing unconfirmed (paid). From chart: Type 1 and Type 8 also prominent.

tests.name: VIA Character Strengths Survey
tests.description: Identifies your top character strengths out of 24.

tests.name: Truity DISC Personality Test
tests.description: DISC personality assessment — Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, Conscientiousness. Maps communication and work style.
tests.notes: Changed to Truity per user preference. Free tier returns primary DISC type and profile.

tests.name: Truity Attachment Style Test
tests.description: Identifies adult attachment style across 4 types: Secure, Anxious, Avoidant, Fearful-Avoidant. Shows scores for all 4.
tests.notes: Swapped from attachmentstyletest.com to Truity per user preference.

tests.name: Truity Holland Code (RIASEC) Career Test
tests.description: Holland Code / RIASEC model — Realistic, Investigative, Artistic, Social, Enterprising, Conventional. Maps career interest profile.
tests.notes: Added per user preference for Truity. Good complement to Enneagram Type 5 (Investigative type expected dominant).

tests.name: Love Languages Quiz
tests.description: Chapman's 5 Love Languages. Returns ranked preference — Words of Affirmation, Acts of Service, Receiving Gifts, Quality Time, Physical Touch.

tests.name: Truity TypeFinder for Relationships
tests.description: Relationship-specific personality test from Truity. Shows how your type functions in romantic relationships.
tests.notes: Added per user preference for Truity. Complements Love Languages and Attachment Style results.

tests.name: IDRlabs Dark Triad Test
tests.description: Measures Narcissism, Machiavellianism, and Psychopathy traits. For self-awareness, not judgment.

tests.name: Moral Foundations Questionnaire
tests.description: Haidt's Moral Foundations Theory. Measures Care, Fairness, Loyalty, Authority, Sanctity, Liberty. Complements political compass and moral framework profile.

tests.name: CliftonStrengths (Gallup)
tests.description: Gallup's flagship strengths assessment. Top 5 talent themes (free tier).
